spec_match.rationale: Extremely clever use of abs() and sign() to map gain value to physical height and oklch color space dynamically.

interactive.rationale: Extremely rich interactive surface with 10 vertical sliders, 6 presets, a dynamic wave animator, and a live CSS readout panel.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fully conforms to the feature index description and showcases complex equalizer behaviors.

edge_cases.rationale: Outstanding support detection and JS fallback mapping to emulate the exact CSS arithmetic on unsupported browsers.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful, dark-themed UI that integrates well with standard design system tokens.

summary: An exceptionally high-quality, 10-band audio equalizer concept that animates and interacts beautifully. While its CSS calculations and JS fallbacks perfectly demonstrate the spec, it misses the mandatory ChromeStatus reference link.
